top10_new_or_updated.title: Join our virtual Town Hall Preview on Mar 23, 7pm UTC!: https://sigchi.org/events/sigchi-town-hall-preview/. Given how much is in flux around us this year, this will be a space for members to raise concerns ahead of our annual town hall at CHI. We'll also get your input on initiatives we've been working on.

top10_new_or_updated.title: Following our Jan 2026 town hall to share feedback on the Digital Library (DL) with ACM, we invite members to read this CACM article on the evolution of the DL: https://cacm.acm.org/opinion/evolving-the-acm-digital-library/. The article lays out the rationale for changes, and further iteration that is underway.

items.title: More Than Just A Period: Adolescent Menstrual Health Across Care Ecosystems
items.description: Understanding care, responsibility, and technology across the life course Women’s health is increasingly recognized as a fundamental human right, yet significant gaps remain in knowledge, literacy, and technological support, particularly around menstrual health (MH). While calls for a life-course approach emphasize adolescence as a formative period [...]

items.title: Cycles of Care: Bridging Medicine, Technology, Sociology, and Intersectional Design in Digital Women’s Health – A Workshop Series
items.description: We are pleased to announce a spring workshop series at the UZH Digital Society Initiative's Health Community: Cycles of Care! Digital women’s health sits at the intersection of medicine, technology, sociology, and intersectionally feminist design. Yet, despite growing evidence of sex- and gender-specific differences, their integration [...]
